/usr/bin/ar qc libsabre.a CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/clients/mqtt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/generic/ipv4_address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/gpio/input_gpio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/logging/log_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/logging/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/parsers/gps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/service/service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/uart/uart_output_stream_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre.dir/sabre/utility/wait_for.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsabre.a
